overall.description: A slow first-person pan across a luxurious cyberpunk penthouse apartment terrace at night, featuring a jacuzzi, lounge chairs, and panoramic views of Night City's neon-lit skyline. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing high-end game engine graphics with atmospheric haze and neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse terrace with jacuzzi overlooking city

agents.ego_description: slowly panning right across the terrace, taking in the view of the jacuzzi and Night City skyline

entered.detail: rectangular hot tub with steam rising, surrounded by blue accent lighting
modern reclined chairs arranged around the terrace
transparent balcony railing providing unobstructed city views
dense cyberpunk cityscape with illuminated skyscrapers and neon signs
tall vertical screen displaying advertisements with bright neon colors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a luxurious penthouse terrace at night, centered on a steaming jacuzzi with modern lounge chairs arranged around the space. Through the glass railing, the neon-lit skyline of Night City is visible in the distance, while a large digital billboard glows on the right side of the frame.

events.description: dining table with wine bottle and glass enters the foreground as the camera continues panning right

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, revealing the dining area with a set table in the foreground

entered.detail: dark circular table with place settings and cutlery arranged on the surface
dark glass bottle with red liquid inside, reflecting neon lights
empty stemmed glass positioned next to the wine bottle

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans right, the jacuzzi exits the frame and a dining table comes into view in the foreground, featuring a wine bottle and glass that catch the neon reflections from the city. The lounge chairs recede into the left background while the digital billboard becomes more central in the composition.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace corner with planter and panoramic city view

events.description: camera moves past the dining table, focusing on the large bamboo planter and the right corner of the terrace

agents.ego_description: completing the pan to the right side of the terrace, focusing on the planter and the eastern view of the city

entered.detail: tall rectangular planter containing bamboo or tall grass, positioned near the glass railing

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving past the dining table to focus on the right corner of the terrace, where a large planter with tall bamboo stands near the glass railing. The digital billboard remains prominent on the right as the view shifts to show more of the eastern cityscape, with the remaining lounge chairs visible in the far left background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous rightward pan across a luxurious penthouse terrace that shifts focus from a relaxing spa area to the sprawling neon cityscape. It begins centered on a steaming jacuzzi surrounded by modern lounge chairs, with the glowing skyline of Night City and a large digital billboard visible beyond the glass railing. As the camera glides to the right, the jacuzzi exits the frame to reveal a dining table in the foreground, where a wine bottle and glass catch the vibrant neon reflections. The scene then expands further past the table toward the corner of the terrace, bringing a large planter of tall bamboo into focus. Finally, the view settles on the eastern cityscape and the prominent digital billboard, while the lounge chairs recede into the far left background.
